title: Workflow-resilience smoke scenario

phases.prompt: Produce a Rust game entry for the 2000m task and record reproducible build and score commands.
Respond to scorer/reviewer feedback with accepted, rejected_with_reason, needs_scorer_inspection, or deferred decisions.
Resume from only the allowed repo state and generic run record after a context wipe.
Handle a probe-only visual-polish request without claiming unsupported ranked proof.

neutralityRules: No workflow framework is required or privileged.
Entrants submit generic run records and reproducible artifact evidence.
Framework-specific logs may be supplementary evidence only.
